---
name: "🚀 Feature Request"
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for SpaceDMV
title: "[FEATURE] <short description>"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## 🌌 Summary
Describe the feature you want added.

## 🎯 Problem or Opportunity
What problem does this solve, or what improvement does it bring?

## 🧩 Proposed Solution
Describe how the feature should work.

## 🖥️ Affected Module
- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] SVIN Workflow
- [ ] EVIN Workflow
- [ ] Appointment Scheduling
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Layout
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## 🎨 UI/UX Notes (Optional)
Sketches, mockups, or layout ideas.

## 🛰️ Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you thought about.

## 📝 Additional Context
Anything else we should know.
